name: Classic Minimalist Card Holder
shortDescription: Sleek, slimline execution for essential cards and folded bills.
fullDescription: Individually benchcrafted with premium full-grain vegetable-tanned leather. Features hand-burnished edges and saddle-stitching for structural longevity. Will age beautifully to reveal a personal rich patina.

name: Artisan Bifold Wallet
shortDescription: Traditional elegance meets rugged, long-term durability.
fullDescription: A beautiful classic design featuring 6 card slots and a dedicated bill compartment. Hand-stitched with durable waxed thread. This wallet feels high-end yet unpretentious.
